sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 4

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 4:1
items.html:
(to the question) Orot Aliyah [Lights of ascent]
Just as through the Zivug de Hakaa [coupling by striking] the Masach [screen] raises Ohr Chozer [Returning Light] and clothes the ten Sefirot of Ohr Yashar [Direct Light] from below upward, so the Masach spreads into ten Sefirot from itself and within itself and clothes the ten Sefirot from above downward, as is known. The Lights clothed in the Ohr Chozer from below upward are called Lights of ascent [Orot Aliyah], and the Lights clothed in the spreading of the Masach from above downward are called Lights of descent [Orot Yeridah]. (p. 778, Item 68)
